Multi-Seq DDP Grouped Overfit — Experiment Report

2026-04-17

073b7be on feat/dcf

ACP pt-n19ooth8 · 4× N6lS (80 GB) · 21.1 min
Data
manifests/dexycb_subject01_manifest.json — 100 seq, 20 YCB objects × 5 seq each
Config
DDP 4 GPU · batch=4 (object-grouped) · V=4 · 40 epochs · 200 optimizer steps · l1+chamfer · GPS on
Eval sequence
subject-01/20200709_141754 (63 tracked frames) · sliding S=4 causal · rest-pose canonical
Status
SHAPE PRESERVED UNDERTRAINED

TL;DR

Multi-sequence + object-grouped batched DDP + chamfer loss breaks the memorization shortcut from the single-sequence runs. On the same subject-01 sequence, the approach-phase chamfer/L2 ratio drops from 1.20 → 1.06: pred clouds now sit roughly on the hand instead of collapsing to a grasp-pose default. Training wall time 21 min on 4 GPUs for 200 optimizer steps, ~32× the view-forward rate of the single-GPU per-sample-accum trainer.
Absolute error went UP on this specific sequence (hand L2 131.5 mm, obj L2 141.9 mm) — expected. The 64 mm hand L2 in the earlier page came from overfitting ONE sequence; this run gives each object only ~10 gradient updates. The next run (≥2000 steps or a warm-start from the 4-frame-window ckpt) should push absolute numbers down while keeping shape preservation.

Diagnosis recap — what this run tests

Response to the 2026-04-17 question: "is the model memorizing the sequence instead of reading the image?". The black-image ablation showed pred clouds shift by 80–190 mm when the image is replaced with zeros, so the model DOES use the image, but a strong memorized grasp-pose prior dominates low-density (approach) frames on single-sequence overfits.

ChangeRole
multi-sequence manifest (100 seq, 20 objects)prior becomes 20-way so memorization no longer fits every training example
l1+chamfer hand lossdirectly penalises pred cloud sitting in the wrong 3-D region (chamfer ratio drops)
object-grouped batch samplerevery batch has a single V_o so per-sample grad-accum is replaced by a real batched forward; 4× more view-forwards per wall-clock minute
DDP 4-GPUindependent 4-way gradient averaging on top of batched within-rank

Progression across runs

RunDataStepsHand L2 meanHand L2 approach thirdChamfer/L2 approachObj L2 mean
per-view overfit (pre-fix)subject-01 single seq500124.21301.2072.0
GPS + 5-frame windowsubject-01 frames 30-345008.7n/an/a17.0
GPS + full seqsubject-01 single seq100064.1129.01.2041.0
multi-seq DDP grouped (this run)subject-01 × 100 seq200131.5153.21.06141.9

Chamfer/L2 = 1 means "pred cloud is spatially wrong, not misaligned"; lower is better shape alignment. The drop from 1.20 → 1.06 in approach frames is the memorization fix. Absolute errors will come down with more steps.
